summary: Completed testing of Iteration 12 features: Profile multilingual translations, Reading history with chapter navigation, Privacy & Terms page with expandable GDPR sections, Consent API endpoints. All backend tests pass (17/17). Frontend features verified working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Profile translations complete for 6 languages (it, en, es, de, fr, pt)
Reading history displays with book name, chapter, read count, and date
Privacy page implements all GDPR requirements: T&C, Privacy Policy, Data Table, AI Transparency, User Rights
Consent API properly tracks user acceptance with document hash and audit trail
seed_data_creation: Reading history entries: Romani 8, Matteo 5, Salmi 23, Giovanni 3, Genesi 1
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 12 features verified working. Profile shows reading history with clickable entries that navigate to Bible chapters. Privacy page (/privacy) has complete GDPR documentation with expandable sections. Consent API tracks user acceptance with 'Accettato' badge displayed on Privacy page.

profile_multilingual_translations.details: 6 languages supported with complete translations for: progress, streak, chapters, entries, readingHistory, noHistory, readCount, times, appFeatures, privacy, logout, etc.

reading_history_display.details: Cronologia Lettura section shows chapters read with book name, chapter number, read count (Letto 1x/2x), date (14/02/2026)

reading_history_navigation.details: Clicking on history entry (e.g., Romani 8) navigates to /bible?book=Romani&chapter=8

privacy_link_in_profile.details: Privacy e Termini (GDPR, T&C, consensi) link visible in Account section, navigates to /privacy

privacy_page_load.details: /privacy page loads with header 'Privacy e Termini', Version 1.0.0, last update date

privacy_toc_section.details: Termini e Condizioni expandable with: 1. DEFINIZIONI E LICENZA D'USO, 2. DIVIETI ESPLICITI (Reverse Engineering, Model Scraping, Prompt Injection), 3. CLAUSOLA DI RISOLUZIONE AUTOMATICA, 4. SAFE HARBOR CLAUSE, 5. LIMITAZIONE DI RESPONSABILITÀ

privacy_policy_section.details: Privacy Policy expandable with: GDPR/EU AI Act reference, Titolare (Andrea Hangar), MODALITÀ DI TRATTAMENTO, STANDARD C2PA, THRESHOLD DI ORIGINALITÀ

data_table_section.details: Dati Trattati shows table with columns: Dato, Finalità, Base Giuridica. Rows: Email, Nome utente, Preferenze lettura, Hash password, Log di consenso, Prompt AI

user_rights_section.details: I Tuoi Diritti shows GDPR Arts 15-22: ACCESSO, RETTIFICA, CANCELLAZIONE, LIMITAZIONE, PORTABILITÀ, OPPOSIZIONE. Contact: andrehangar@live.it, 30 day response

consent_api_accept.details: POST /api/consent/accept?version=1.0.0 creates consent record with document_hash, timestamp, ip_masked, user_agent

accepted_badge.details: Green 'Accettato' badge with checkmark visible on Privacy page header when consent is accepted

contact_email.details: Contact section shows andrehangar@live.it at bottom of Privacy page
